mems.content:
## THE-ZERO-EVENT Gap Audit - 2026-02-27

### Agent Audit (Score: 7/10 per agent)
- 8/8 agents missing `tasks` field for delegation permissions
- 0/8 agents paired with workflows/prompts/references/templates
- All have proper frontmatter, mode, tools, permissions, identity

### Command Audit (Score: 6/10)
- FLAT structure (43 commands in one directory) - violates spec
- Need ~10 groups (settings/, code-intel/, context/, etc.)
- 100% frontmatter compliance on core fields
- 33% have required_templates

### Chaining Audit (Score: 6/10)
- 72% commands (31/43) have empty required_skills arrays
- Workflows don't explicitly load skill bundles at step level
- Duplicate registry files (skills/ and .opencode/skills/)
- References directory not chained to commands
